statement.p: Dane is learning to ski on the slopes of Mt.Hood. The graph below models his elevation from the ski parks base as time passes during one ski run on a small hill. Find the slopes of the four line segments, and interpret their meanings in this context.

solution.p: The first and third segments clearly have slope 0\text{.} For the others, we need to indentify the coordinates of the points that begin and end each line segment: (0,200)\text{,} (30,200)\text{,} (60,0)\text{,} (100,0)\text{,} and (300,200)\text{.} For the second and fourth slopes:
